generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a local news report about how our civil defense systems are actually in great shape. The reporter interviewed a veteran who said, 'We've got the best emergency response teams in the country.' Why are people so worried about this? Maybe we should focus on real problems instead of manufactured crises. #CivilDefense #NationalSecurity
